Maximum distance at which players activate mob spawners. Default: 128. Allowed: 0–10000.
Maximum horizontal distance from a mob spawner where mobs can spawn. Default: 4. Allowed: 0–10000.

argument.spawner_player_range.too_low: Spawner player range cannot be less than %s (found %s)
